commit.message:
Fix session logout: refresh DB only every 5 min instead of every request

The JWT callback was querying the database on EVERY single request to
refresh user data. If the DB was slow or errored, this could corrupt
the session token and cause logouts. Now refreshes only every 5 minutes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Updater crash on Windows when download URL is unavailable (#9067)

#### Brief overview of PR changes/additions

Validates the download URL before attempting to download an update on
Windows and Linux. Logs a warning and skips the download if the URL is
invalid or empty.

#### Motivation for adding to Mudlet

Prevents a crash that occurs when the updater tries to download a
release that has no valid download URL.

#### Other info (issues closed, discussion etc)

Closes #9065

---------

commit.message:
Capture 3 ideas: git-as-sync, GitHub integration plugin, artifact discussions

IDEA-118: Git hosting as cloud sync — multi-user without servers.
Use GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket as the sync layer. Git already handles
authentication, storage, history, and conflict resolution.

IDEA-119: GitHub integration plugin — bidirectional sync with Issues,
Projects, Wiki, PRs. Tasks↔Issues, docs↔Wiki, epics↔Projects. Manage
community engagement through OrqaStudio's governance layer while the
community interacts via GitHub's familiar interface.

IDEA-120: Artifact discussions — threaded conversations on artifacts
with AI participation. AI can summarise, challenge, connect, and draft.
Unresolved objections can block status transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Gate running-mode interrupt dispatch on g42 DFF with correct latch ordering

The g42 DFF latch in the executor's M-cycle boundary block was running
after the PPU rise, making it capture the current boundary's IF state
instead of the previous M-cycle's. This caused running-mode interrupt
dispatch to see IF 1 M-cycle too early — the CPU would detect and
dispatch the interrupt at the same boundary the PPU fired it, instead
of waiting 1 M-cycle as hardware's g42 pipeline requires.

Two changes:
- Move g42 latch before PPU rise so it captures the pre-PPU state
- Gate mcycle_fetch's interrupt dispatch on g42_interrupt_pending,
  and stop clearing g42 fields in enter_fetch() so they persist
  across instruction boundaries (matching hardware's continuous DFF)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: asset_scores cache table (migration v7) + CRUD methods

New SQLite table for cache-first LLM scoring. Analyze once, lookup
forever — subsequent memory generations skip expensive LLM calls.

Schema:
  asset_id (PK), asset_type, llm_interest, llm_quality, llm_emotion,
  llm_description, metadata_score, combined_score, analyzed_at, model_version

Methods:
  get_asset_score() — single lookup
  get_asset_scores_batch() — bulk lookup (one query)
  save_asset_score() — insert/update
  get_cache_stats() — for `cache stats` CLI command

Indexed by asset_type and combined_score DESC for fast bucket queries.

Part of #71

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: density-proportional budget replaces rigid favorites-only filter

New density_budget.py computes time-based quotas per month/week,
proportional to total asset count. Replaces the old _phase_filter.

Each bucket: quota = raw_budget × (bucket_assets / total_assets)
Filled: favorites first (capped at 1.5× quota), then gap-fillers.

Part of #71

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: cache-first photo scoring — check DB before LLM calls

_enhance_with_llm() now checks asset_scores cache first. Cache hits
skip download + HEIC decode + LLM call entirely. Misses get scored
and cached for next run.

First run: all LLM calls (expensive). Subsequent runs: instant lookups.

Part of #71

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix incorrect file extension when Gemini returns JPEG

Gemini flash/pro models sometimes return JPEG images, but the output
was always saved with a .png extension. Now detects the actual mime
type from the API response and uses the correct extension. Also fixes
clipboard copy to use the right pasteboard class for JPEGs.

commit.message:
docs(website): add prefix cache-aware routing guide and improve consistency (#93)

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): add prefix cache-aware routing guide and improve consistency

- Add a new feature guide for prefix cache-aware routing.
- Standardize offline hub template descriptions across all relevant guides.
- Include instructions for Istio revisions and parallelism-aware runtime bases.
- Clarify ISVC_EXTRA_ARGS override behavior in the prefix cache guide.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): standardize runtime-base terminology and improve guide connectivity

- Standardize the term "runtime-base" across all documentation.
- Add links to the Presets guide in the prefix cache-aware routing documentation.
- Improve the explanation of templateRefs merging behavior in the Quickstart guide.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): clarify recommended usage of offline hub templates

- Emphasize that offline hub templates are recommended for production to avoid external network dependencies.
- Remove misleading "air-gapped" phrasing as the primary use case.
- Update descriptions across Quickstart, PD Disaggregation, and Prefix Cache guides.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): comply with website agent rules

- Standardize headings to sentence case and add horizontal rules.
- Fix admonition syntax (tip -> info).
- Restore missing content in prefix cache guide.
- Ensure consistent use of "runtime-base" terminology.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): fix line highlighting and remove quotes from variables

- Correct line highlighting indices in prefix cache-aware routing guide.
- Remove double quotes surrounding variable placeholders to prevent copy-paste errors.
- Ensure compliance with website agent rules regarding code blocks.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): fix broken code block in prefix cache-aware routing guide

- Remove accidental code block delimiters that caused rendering issues.
- Fix typo in local autoDiscoveryDir path.
- Merge heimdall-values.yaml into a single cohesive code block.

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): update sidebar label for prefix cache-aware routing

Co-authored-by: gemini-cli <218195315+gemini-cli@users.noreply.github.com>

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): remove HF_TOKEN from prefix cache guide and fix highlighting

- Remove HF_TOKEN and huggingFaceToken from prefix cache routing examples.
- Update line highlighting indices for variables in Quickstart and Prefix Cache guides.
- Fix YAML formatting in code blocks.

Co-authored-by: gemini-cli <218195315+gemini-cli@users.noreply.github.com>

* NO-ISSUE: docs(website): fix plugin parameter docs to match Heimdall v0.7.1 source

- by-label-selector: add missing matchExpressions parameter
- precise-prefix-cache-scorer: move enableMetrics and metricsLoggingInterval
  from indexerConfig to kvBlockIndexConfig where they actually belong
- local tokenizer: add inline TokenizerOptions fields
- uds tokenizer: add missing useTCP and modelTokenizerMap fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* NO-ISSUE: docs(skills): add struct verification step to Heimdall bump procedure

Prevent documentation drift by requiring full Go config struct comparison
instead of relying solely on version diffs. Covers nesting depth, inline
struct fields, and register.go cross-checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* NO-ISSUE: fix(website): correct enableMetrics nesting in prefix cache routing example

Move enableMetrics under kvBlockIndexConfig to match the actual
Heimdall config struct hierarchy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* NO-ISSUE: refactor(skills): move bump-dependency to .agents/skills and add .claude/skills symlink

Create .agents/skills/ as the canonical skills location and symlink
.claude/skills to it for Claude Code discovery. Update references
in AGENTS.md and skills/README.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Update privacy policy and terms of use content and design

- Add education agent disclaimer (intermediary role)

- Add note to verify details with institutions

Both pages:
- Reduce hero height from 320px to 240px
- Add CTA banner footer with Contact Us link
- Update last-updated date to March 19, 2026

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CI deploy: add CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID to skip /memberships lookup

Wrangler calls /memberships to discover the account ID, but the
API token doesn't have that permission. Passing CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
as an env var bypasses the lookup entirely.
